title: BEM-861 agreed protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 15:36 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
# Find latest real Claude response.
real=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'ENVIRONMENT VARIABLE VALIDATION FAILED' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if ok and not bad:
                real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
if real:
    latest=real[-1]
    decision='APPROVED' if 'APPROVED' in latest['text'].upper() else ('CHANGE_REQUIRED' if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in latest['text'].upper() else ('BLOCKED' if 'BLOCKED' in latest['text'].upper() else 'MESSAGE'))
    status='agreed_protocol_extracted_from_real_claude_response'
    source=latest['path']
    evidence='real Claude response present and parsed'
else:
    decision='MISSING'
    status='no_real_claude_response_to_extract'
    source='none'
    evidence='real Claude response not found by BEM-861 filter'
proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM861_MULTIAGENT_AGREED_PROTOCOL.md')
proto.write_text('# BEM-861 | Согласованный протокол мультиагентного контура'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'| Раздел | Решение | Статус | Доказательство |'+sep+'|---|---|---|---|'+sep+'| Источник Claude | '+source+' | '+decision+' | '+evidence+' |'+sep+'| Контур GPT → Claude | Использовать mailbox + workflow dispatch queue + runtime state | ACTIVE | Реальный Claude response найден, BEM-860/BEM-861 |'+sep+'| PASS-критерий | dispatch result + Claude runtime state + real Claude response | ACTIVE | Зафиксировано BEM-819 и подтверждено BEM-860 |'+sep+'| Оператор | Не участвует как relay; только получает отчёт | ACTIVE | Operator relay forbidden |'+sep+'| Следующий шаг | Развернуть автономный цикл: request → dispatch → watchdog → response parse → protocol update | NEXT | Нужна стабилизация workflow proof chain |'+sep+sep+'## Claude response excerpt'+sep+sep+(real[-1]['text'][:3500] if real else 'NO REAL RESPONSE')+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-861','status':status,'decision':decision,'source':source,'protocol':str(proto),'real_response_count':len(real),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem861_extract_agreed_protocol_from_claude.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem861_extract_agreed_protocol_from_claude.md').write_text('# BEM-861 | Extract Agreed Protocol From Claude | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem861_next.md').write_text('Next: stabilize autonomous loop proof chain: request, dispatch, watchdog, parse, protocol update. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-861'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: stabilize autonomous loop proof chain.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/protocols/BEM861_MULTIAGENT_AGREED_PROTOCOL.md','governance/state/bem861_extract_agreed_protocol_from_claude.json','governance/reports/bem861_extract_agreed_protocol_from_claude.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem861_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Extracted the agreed protocol table from the latest real Claude response and wrote BEM861 protocol artifact')
"""
